title: Corpse Tweaker
description: allows you to customize the pose of the corpse.
body:
# CorpseTweaker
allows you to customize the pose of the corpse.

## HitBox
This mod has adjusted the hitbox of the corpse to make it larger.

## Pose
You can modify the pose of the corpse in real time within the configuration file.

## Screenshots
![HitBox](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4ce07b14c8e8a46a720687761be5848c0bece71.png)

![CorpsePose](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4929a7434dd6328dd1154ad835c1db134e43d9ba.png)
